content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — SettingsView.swift:12 labels the "AI Sort" toggle "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order", user-facing copy suggesting an unfinished feature.

Pierre: Apple reviewers may question shipping a feature explicitly marked "Experimental" and warned to "lose sort order," as this suggests the build contains unfinished/unstable functionality rather than a polished release. Store metadata and release notes are clean, but this in-app string is user-visible. Consider rephrasing to something like "New: AI-powered sorting" without admitting instability, or gate the feature until it's stable.
